flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Gaston College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (66.5% → 54.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gaston College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gaston College fell 34% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.0k → $2.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gaston College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 3.5k).
